Bug Bounty Proof of Concept Files

IMPORTANT NOTICE: This website hosts only authorized bug bounty proof of concept (PoC) files. Nothing malicious is hosted or intended. All content adheres to responsible disclosure practices.

About This Site

This website is dedicated solely to hosting proof of concept files that demonstrate security vulnerabilities discovered through legitimate bug bounty programs. These files are maintained for educational and verification purposes only.

Compliance Statement

I strictly adhere to all guidelines and rules established by bug bounty platforms, including but not limited to:

  • Only testing systems within authorized scope
  • Following responsible disclosure timelines
  • Not sharing sensitive data or personally identifiable information
  • Not performing denial of service attacks or actions that could harm systems
  • Obtaining proper authorization before publishing any findings

Platform Guidelines

All proof of concept files hosted here comply with the guidelines of major bug bounty platforms:

  • HackerOne Disclosure Guidelines
  • Bugcrowd Disclosure Terms
  • Intigriti Disclosure Policy
  • YesWeHack Disclosure Policy

Learn More About Bug Bounties

Bug bounty programs are initiatives that reward individuals for discovering and reporting software bugs, especially those related to security vulnerabilities.

For more information about bug bounty programs, please visit the Wikipedia page on Bug Bounty Programs.

Contact

If you have any concerns about the content hosted on this site, please contact me immediately at random@0xz.org.
